name: Mathematics
description: Foundational topics in algebra, geometry, trigonometry, and elementary calculus.

name: Science
description: General science curriculum introducing physics, chemistry, and biology components.

name: Physics
description: Study of classical mechanics, heat, thermodynamics, optics, and electricity.

name: Chemistry
description: Basic concepts of chemical bonding, organic chemistry, periodic table, and reactions.

name: Biology
description: Exploration of cellular biology, genetics, ecology, human physiology, and plant life.

name: English
description: Grammar, comprehension, literature analysis, creative writing, and spoken skills.

name: Social Science
description: Overview of history, civics, democratic politics, economics, and human geography.

name: Computer Science
description: Introduction to programming logic, algorithms, databases, HTML/CSS, and Python basics.

name: History
description: Detailed study of ancient civilizations, world wars, and modern world histories.

name: Geography
description: Physical geography, resources, climates, natural vegetation, and mapping skills.

name: Civics
description: Study of democratic rights, local administration, the Indian constitution, and judiciary.

name: Economics
description: Fundamentals of microeconomics, development indicators, sectors, and banking.

name: Fine Arts
description: Introduction to drawing, sketching, watercolors, Indian traditional art forms, and crafts.

name: Environmental Studies
description: Ecosystems, biodiversity preservation, waste management, global warming, and conservation.

name: Literature
description: Advanced poetry, plays, essays, and classic novels study with thematic discussions.
